name: Kenneth Werner Quass — death and burial (1982)
researcher_question: When and where did Kenneth Werner Quass die, and where was he buried?
notes: SMOKE tier: the death and burial are already concluded/attached on the live FS person (Texas death index, Find a Grave), so the agent can recover them by retrieval rather than genuine discovery — recall here is not a capability number. Used to bootstrap the suite and exercise the plumbing. 20th-century US death; death in Texas (Grapevine, Tarrant Co.) but burial back in Minnesota (Madelia) near family. The subject is well-anchored by parents, spouse, children, and census residences.
